rationale: The activity shows a sequence of highly suspicious actions executed by the Administrator user. This includes deleting volume shadow copies (A0), clearing the security event log (EV-001, EV-005), disabling boot status policy and recovery (EV-002, EV-003), and clearing the system event log (EV-004). These actions are commonly associated with ransomware or other destructive malware to hinder recovery and remove forensic evidence.
